title: Binary Search Tree Generator
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a Java code that creates a binary search tree (BST) from a sorted list of integers. The code should recursively construct the BST, ensuring that each node's value is greater than its left child and less than its right child. The generated code should include methods for inserting nodes and traversing the tree (in-order, pre-order, and post-order).

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is written in correct Java syntax.
The code adheres to the provided constraints (Java syntax and recursive method definitions).
The code implements a correct recursive BST construction algorithm.
